types.description: Skill emerges from composition of graded prior work. Auto-derived for every fused/Ultimate skill from suiteComponents (RFC §10.8). Only graded≥C origins count toward origin tally.
types.magnitude: 20 * origins for origins <= 10; 200 + 20 * sqrt(origins - 10) for origins > 10
types.cap: softened (no hard cap; sqrt curve limits growth past 10 origins)
types.notes: Mandatory for any fused or Ultimate skill. A skill with suiteComponents and no fusion-recipe row fails validation (RFC §10.2). Only graded≥C origins count (RFC §3.5).

types.description: Stars on the skill's own repository. Mothership-discounted when the repo contains multiple skills.
types.magnitude: min(200, stars / 1000) / mothership_divisor where mothership_divisor = min(skill_count_in_repo, 4)
types.freshness: re-fetch quarterly; no time decay (gaia refresh-stars re-stamps lastVerified)
types.notes: Same-source dedup collapses multiple entries pointing at same canonical URL to one. Fork-network canonicalization merges forks of same upstream unless evidence entry sets links.canonicalRepo. S-capable at 100k+ stars.

types.description: The skill's artifact is bundled inside a separately-starred external project.
types.notes: Until proxy-containment validator ships, claims count at full magnitude with explicit unverified=true flag. S-capable at 125k+ external stars (RFC §2.4).

types.description: A 4★+ Verifier signs an attestation that the skill is real and graded fairly.
types.freshness: null on derank — evaluates to null (not zero) when attesting Verifier drops below 4★ (RFC §5.6)
types.notes: No cap on verifier count for magnitude. Diversity gate for S counts max 3 verifiers as one distinct type slot. Null-on-derank: the row is removed from TM sum; flag preserved for audit. S-capable at 3+ verifiers.

types.description: A reproducible benchmark on a public dataset, scored as percentile rank within the field.
types.notes: S-capable at 95th+ percentile. Weight 1.4 because percentiles are externally verifiable. Only at 1.4 (not 1.5) because benchmark choice can be cherry-picked.

types.description: Academic citation count for a published paper associated with the skill.
types.notes: S-capable at 500+ citations (artifact_score=100). High citation counts cluster around foundational papers — these legitimately deserve S. S floor is 95 (artifact_score threshold).

types.description: Structured walkthrough with written critique by 4★+ reviewers (distinct from verifier-attestation).
types.notes: S-capable at 3+ distinct reviewers (magnitude=75, weight=1.2, artifact_score≈90). Published NAR/Nature-level peer-reviewed papers with 4★+ reviewers legitimately deserve S. S floor is 88.

types.description: Artifact volume evidence from the contributor's own repository (commits + contributors).
types.notes: B-cap and weight 0.6 ensure repo-own alone cannot carry a skill past B. Diversity gate classes repo-own as self-producible: A or S requires non-self-producible evidence on top.

types.description: Contributor declaration that the skill exists and is real. Flat 10 magnitude, max 1 entry per skill.
types.notes: C-cap. A skill with only self-attestation scores 5 artifact score (10 × 0.5) and lands ungraded. Placeholder for newly-added skills with no external trail yet.

types.description: Creator/audience evidence — video views, engagement, topical authority from external creators.
types.magnitude: log10(views) * 8 * creator_mult * engagement_ratio where engagement_ratio = min(1.5, (likes + comments*5) / views * 50)
types.notes: Hard A-cap (RFC §10.7): social-signal contribution to TM never exceeds 80. Same-creator dedup: 2nd entry at 0.5×, 3rd at 0.25× regardless of slot. recognizedVoice (1.2×) requires 2 cross-org 4★+ verifier cosigns via gaia dev evidence --cosign-with.
